description: OpenAI的B2B信号研究揭示了前沿企业如何深化人工智能应用、扩展基于Codex的智能体工作流，并构建持久的竞争优势。
titleZh: 前沿企业如何构建人工智能优势
titleEn: How cutting-edge companies build artificial intelligence advantages
descriptionZh: OpenAI的B2B信号研究揭示了前沿企业如何深化人工智能应用、扩展基于Codex的智能体工作流，并构建持久的竞争优势。
descriptionEn: OpenAI’s B2B Signals research reveals how cutting-edge companies are deepening their AI applications, expanding their Codex-based agent workflows, and building lasting competitive advantages.

title: 利用MRC（多路径可靠连接）解锁大规模人工智能训练网络
description: OpenAI推出MRC（多路径可靠连接），这是一种通过OCP发布的新型超级计算机网络协议，旨在提升大规模人工智能训练集群的韧性与性能。
titleZh: 利用MRC（多路径可靠连接）解锁大规模人工智能训练网络
titleEn: Unlocking large-scale AI training networks with MRC (Multipath Reliable Connectivity)
descriptionZh: OpenAI推出MRC（多路径可靠连接），这是一种通过OCP发布的新型超级计算机网络协议，旨在提升大规模人工智能训练集群的韧性与性能。
descriptionEn: OpenAI launches MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a new supercomputer network protocol released through OCP, designed to improve the resilience and performance of large-scale artificial intelligence training clusters.

title: Anthropic让AI在上班前阅读员工手册：跑路率从54%下降到7%
description: Anthropic的最新研究让AI首先理解规则背后的含义，然后接收行为演示，在具体实验中将智能体失控率从54%降低到7%。
titleZh: Anthropic让AI在上班前阅读员工手册：跑路率从54%下降到7%
titleEn: Anthropic lets AI read employee handbook before starting work: runaway rate drops from 54% to 7%
descriptionZh: Anthropic的最新研究让AI首先理解规则背后的含义，然后接收行为演示，在具体实验中将智能体失控率从54%降低到7%。
descriptionEn: Anthropic's latest research lets AI first understand the meaning behind the rules, then receive behavioral demonstrations, reducing the agent runaway rate from 54% to 7% in specific experiments.

title: 克劳德全面腾飞，抢到5GW AWS算力+250亿美元，贝索斯发财了
description: 1000亿美元投入AWS算力，能耗相当于5座核电站，收入飙升至300亿美元——Anthropic和亚马逊刚刚签署了人工智能史上最疯狂的“军火交易”。
titleZh: 克劳德全面腾飞，抢到5GW AWS算力+250亿美元，贝索斯发财了
titleEn: Claude takes off completely, grabbing 5GW of AWS computing power + $25 billion, Bezos makes a fortune
descriptionZh: 1000亿美元投入AWS算力，能耗相当于5座核电站，收入飙升至300亿美元——Anthropic和亚马逊刚刚签署了人工智能史上最疯狂的“军火交易”。
descriptionEn: $$100 billion poured into AWS computing power, energy consumption equivalent to five nuclear power plants, revenue soaring to $30 billion—Anthropic and Amazon have just signed the craziest "arms deal" in AI history.

title: AI打造AI本身，2028年底概率60%，Anthropic联合创始人坐不住了
description: 在阅读了数百个公开数据点后，Anthropic 联合创始人 Jack Clark 得出了一个连他都无法忽视的结论：到 2028 年底，AI 构建 AI 本身的概率为 60%。
titleZh: AI打造AI本身，2028年底概率60%，Anthropic联合创始人坐不住了
titleEn: AI builds AI itself, 60% probability by end of 2028, Anthropic co-founder can't sit still
descriptionZh: 在阅读了数百个公开数据点后，Anthropic 联合创始人 Jack Clark 得出了一个连他都无法忽视的结论：到 2028 年底，AI 构建 AI 本身的概率为 60%。
descriptionEn: After reading hundreds of public data points, Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark reached a conclusion that even he couldn't ignore: by the end of 2028, the probability of AI building AI itself is 60%. Supporting this judgment are multiple capability curves—programming, research replication, model training optimization—each soaring upward without signs of slowing down.

title: 为什么豆宝误认为范伟是黎元洪，用户还依赖它？
description: 盲目相信人工智能比没有人工智能更糟糕。
titleZh: 为什么豆宝误认为范伟是黎元洪，用户还依赖它？

descriptionZh: 盲目相信人工智能比没有人工智能更糟糕。
descriptionEn: Blind faith in AI is worse than no AI.

title: 内存不够，AI只能“从头开始”。
description: 美光核心数据中心业务负责人表示，人工智能正在将内存行业从传统的周期性模式转向可持续增长，内存成为数据中心推理阶段的“关键战略资产”。
titleZh: 内存不够，AI只能“从头开始”。
titleEn: Not enough memory, AI has to "start from scratch." Micron executive: We can't keep up with memory demand—five global fabs are still not enough
descriptionZh: 美光核心数据中心业务负责人表示，人工智能正在将内存行业从传统的周期性模式转向可持续增长，内存成为数据中心推理阶段的“关键战略资产”。
descriptionEn: The head of Micron's core data center business said AI is shifting the memory industry from traditional cyclical patterns to sustainable growth, with memory becoming a "key strategic asset" in the inference phase of data centers. As AI inference context windows continue to expand, insufficient memory leads to exponential recomputation, while adequate memory can boost GPU utilization by a square factor. He admitted that global fab capacity can no longer keep up with demand, and Micron is simultaneously building five fabs worldwide.
